Trainee agent Tara King joins Steed as they search for a traitor within the organisation. Mrs. Peel leaves the team when her missing husband reappears. Stars Patrick Macnee and Linda Thorson.

Hollister stops gunman Jess Buckhorn from shooting Little Hawk, who denies stealing horses from a mission.
Buck, Manolito and Billy Blue are sent to Tucson for food, supplies and boots, but are side-tracked instead by women and song.
Can a palm print on the roof of a car reveal the identity of an elusive agent called, The Fox? However, retrieving the car and the print proves to be more difficult than expected.
Steed finds himself in danger when known spies escape from Oldhill Monastery. Can The Avengers locate the prisoners before it is too late and discover how they were able to escape so freely?
Fearing a visiting dignitary is about to head a revolution in his home country, Steed and Tara investigate the theft of three thousand army rifles.
